title: Five year Integrated B.B.A. LL.B (Hons.)
content: B.B.A LL.B. (Hons.) is a five-year integrated program, spread over 10 semesters, consisting of Law and Business administration courses. The program covers major domains of business education and key law courses, to help students learn the crucial interface of business and law in India and abroad. As per regulations of the Bar Council of India, BBA LLB (Hons) will lead to a professional Law degree with a seamless integration of Business Administration as the first degree. It will aid the learners to become accomplished professionals understanding the interface of Business and Law and will build the requisite capacity. XII with minimum 50% marks aggregate Applicant with a valid score in AILET / CLAT/ CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) Score/Rank/Percentile will be given preference in Merit 01 Utilize comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge to meet the contemporary challenges. 02 Serve the society through their professional skills in advocacy, judicial and other legal services. 03 Handle legal issues cutting across boundaries covering substantive and procedural laws. 04 Exhibit legal excellence at international and domestic fora. 01 Students shall possess the understanding and apply legal theories, Substantive and Procedural laws. 02 Students shall demonstrate proficiency in legal research, reasoning and analysis. 03 Students shall develop management & team building skills with reference to social and legal issues. 04 Students shall develop mooting, counselling and negotiation skills. 05 Students shall imbibe ethics to be demonstrated in professional setup. 06 Students shall serve the society through legal aid and legal awareness. 01 Graduates shall manifest integrated understanding of law and managerial ecosystem. 02 Graduates shall demonstrate the relevant skills to handle legal issues pertaining to entrepreneurship. 03 Graduates shall exhibit skills for managing business in a fast evolving global environment. 04 Graduates shall analyze and implement changes in regard to rule of law, economic reforms, cyber law, human rights, marginalized segments of the population. 01 Students shall be able to develop expertise and foundation for professional practice in the legal aspects of Business and Entrepreneurship. 02 Graduates shall be able to acquire the requisite skills to deal with the interdisciplinary matters related to Law and Management. 03 Students shall acquire proficiency in written and oral communication. 04 Students shall develop management and team building skills with reference to social and legal issues. 05 Students shall develop mooting, counselling and negotiation skills. 06 Students shall imbibe ethics to be demonstrated in professional setup. 07 Students shall serve the society through legal aid and legal awareness.
